title: echinolaena brachystachya
intro: Echinolaena brachystachya, also known as the 'short-spiked Echinolaena', is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Echinolaena brachystachya include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Echinolaena brachystachya can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses.
